title: Grlubb
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Grlubb |homeworld=[[Peridon's Folly]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What weapon can be unethical?''"
"''Biological weapons, insidious nerve gas - you know, things that don't make a bang. That takes most of the fun out of it.|IG-88 and Grlubb|{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}}} '''Grlubb''' was a weapons runner and petty dictator on [[Peridon's Folly]]. A small, rodent-like creature, Grlubb was the first person to hire [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B]] as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. He hired the assassin droid to destroy a rival's biological weapons facility, a type of weapon Grlubb considered unethical. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{FactFile|22|ASS 3-4|IG Assassin Droids}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Grlubb }} [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Humanoids]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
